overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban underpass. The player moves from a purple-lit food stall area past construction fencing, through a crowded covered walkway with holographic advertisements, and ends at a weapon vendor doorway. The scene features dense cyberpunk architecture with vibrant neon lighting.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a covered urban walkway at night, dominated by a purple neon-lit food stall on the right. Several people sit around a glowing fire pit in the center. As the camera moves forward, a woman stands up from the fire pit and walks past. Red construction fencing blocks the path ahead under a massive concrete overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass entrance with advertising kiosks

events.description: moving past red fence into wider underpass area with yellow kiosk visible

agents.ego_description: walking through underpass following other pedestrians ahead

entered.detail: yellow cylindrical kiosk with large holographic advertisements
wall with vertical strips of colored LED lights

segments.scene_description: Moving past the red construction fence, the scene transitions into a wider covered underpass. A yellow advertising kiosk with holographic displays appears on the right, while colorful LED strips line the left wall. The crowd density increases as pedestrians walk in the same direction through the concrete corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded underpass corridor with neon advertising

events.description: passing colorful LED strips that cast shifting colored light on the scene

agents.ego_description: walking through underpass following a person in a blue jacket ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the enclosed underpass, following a crowd of pedestrians. The yellow advertising kiosk remains prominent on the right while colorful LED walls line the left. The lighting shifts as the camera passes different colored light strips, casting dynamic reflections on the wet concrete floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dead end area with weapon vendor terminal

events.description: approaching dark concrete wall at end of underpass corridor
slowing down while approaching doorway with red neon signage

agents.ego_description: approaching a doorway with red neon Drop Point signage at the end of the underpass

entered.detail: doorway with red neon signage and weapon vending machine displays
large dark concrete wall marking the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The underpass opens into a small dead-end area with a massive concrete wall ahead. The yellow kiosk and LED walls pass out of view as the camera approaches a doorway marked by red neon signs. This Drop Point terminal features weapon displays and marks the end of the walkway, with the camera slowing as it reaches the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched urban underpass that transitions from a social gathering space into a commercial dead-end. It begins in a covered walkway dominated by a purple-lit food stall and a glowing central fire pit, moving forward as a woman stands and walks past toward red construction fencing. As the camera pushes past the barriers, the environment expands into a wider concrete corridor where yellow holographic kiosks and colorful LED strips replace the stall, while the crowd of pedestrians grows denser. The scene then shifts through a series of dynamic light reflections on the wet floor as the camera follows the flow of people deeper into the underpass. Finally, the walkway opens into a small terminal area, passing the LED walls to approach a doorway marked by red neon signs and weapon displays.
